item.title: Major Security Misconfiguration Impacting ServiceNow and Other SaaS Instances Discovered
item.description: AppOmni uncovered misconfigurations and over-provisioning that put PII and other data at risk.

item.title: Avoid Salesforce Security Vulnerabilities When Building Custom Lightning Components in Apex
item.description: Lightning Components offer an unlimited amount of functionality and are a one of the huge benefits of the Salesforce platform. However, security vulnerabilities may be introduced within Apex code, which may then be exploited by a malicious actor.

item.title: Third-Party Risk in Salesforce Named Credentials
item.description: This article provides an overview of Named Credentials, a feature introduced by Salesforce in the Spring ’15 release to combat the issue of hardcoded credentials within an organization’s Apex codebase.

item.title: SaaS Risks in Healthcare: Anatomy of a Data Exposure at the HSE
item.description: This blog goes over how to handle sensitive data in SaaS applications by learning from the misconfiguration in the Health Service Executive’s (HSE) portal.

item.title: Balancing Act: Navigating the Advantages and Risks of ServiceNow’s New Security Attributes
item.description: ServiceNow's SAs offer an alternative method for access control, designed to be human-readable and offer detailed auditing and logging.

item.title: Salesforce Misuse of Platform Cache Leads to Widespread Data Exposure
item.description: Learn how Salesforce Platform Cache misuse is causing information disclosure in over 80% of implementations handling sensitive data.

item.title: End-to-End Zero Trust With Zero Trust Posture Management (ZTPM)
item.description: Learn about the limitations of traditional Zero Trust with SaaS security and how organizations can implement Zero Trust Posture Management (ZTPM).

item.title: Elevating Identity Intelligence With Zero Trust Posture Management (ZTPM)
item.description: Learn how integrating SaaS visibility and user threat detection strengthens an organization’s security measures within a Zero Trust framework.

item.title: Closing Security Gaps with AppOmni and Okta’s Integrated SaaS and Identity Protection
item.description: Read the blog on how AppOmni and Okta address the challenge of security teams correlating identity behavior with SaaS activity through the Shared Signals Framework (SSF).

item.title: Low-Code, High Stakes: Why Security Can’t Be an Afterthought for Customers Using Salesforce Industry Clouds
item.description: AppOmni found 20+ security issues in Salesforce industry clouds, including zero-days. Learn the risks and how to secure your environment.

item.title: Salesforce Data Breach: Significant Leaks Identified
item.description: New Salesforce data breach risks found. Learn how misconfigurations lead to Salesforce security risks and potential Salesforce breach exposure.

item.title: Strengthen Least Privilege with OAuth Token Manager
item.description: Learn how AppOmni’s OAuth Token Manager gives non-admins secure & scoped API access, solving RBAC pain points without compromising admin control.

item.title: AppOmni Guidance on the Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA)
item.description: Learn how traditional and non-traditional financial services institutions can comply with DORA requirements with the help of AppOmni’s SaaS security platform.

item.title: Simplifying SaaS Security with the Power of GenAI
item.description: Learn how AI is transforming SaaS security and why AI-driven security is not just an advantage to your SaaS ecosystems, but a necessity that will help redefine how critical data is protected.

item.title: How Using AI Simplifies SaaS Security: Smarter Investigations Start with AskOmni
item.description: Discover how AskOmni's new variable prompts simplify SaaS security investigations. AppOmni helps teams move faster with AI-driven insights.

item.title: What the U.S. Cybersecurity Strategy Means for SaaS Apps
item.description: See why new White House cybersecurity guidelines make the shared responsibility model and proper security tooling more essential than ever.

item.title: 3 Key Takeaways from Forrester’s 2023 SSPM Landscape Report
item.description: Discover key takeaways from Forrester's 2023 SSPM report and learn why security and IT teams should invest in SSPM solutions like AppOmni.

item.title: A Holistic Approach to SaaS Security
item.description: Fusing threat detection with configuration management provides much-needed layered defense for SaaS environments.

item.title: Why Your SaaS Security Strategy is Incomplete Without SSPM
item.description: See why relying on native SaaS security settings, CASBs, and cloud-focused security tooling makes your organization vulnerable to threats.

item.title: How to Secure Your SaaS Environment from Three Common SaaS Misconfigurations
item.description: Gain insights into three prevalent SaaS misconfigurations overlooked by security teams and essential information regarding SaaS risk management.

item.title: SSPM vs CSPM: Why You Need Both to Secure Your Organization
item.description: Learn about the difference between SSPM vs CSPM and why your organization needs both for a unified security strategy and protecting critical data.

item.title: SaaS Security Posture Checklist: 25 Questions to Ask | AppOmni
item.description: Strengthen your SaaS security posture with our 25-point SaaS security posture checklist and bolster your overall SSPM strategy.

item.title: Seven Capabilities of a Robust SaaS Security Program
item.description: This blog covers the seven sections of our SaaS security checklist that guides you to build out a robust SaaS security program.

item.title: CISO’s Checklist: How to Train Employees to be SaaS Cyber Aware
item.description: In the first part of this three-part blog series, read about session hijacking, what it is, how to detect it and best practices to mitigate session hijacking.

item.title: Building A SaaS Security Program: A Quick Start Guide
item.description: The use of SaaS applications represents a foundational shift in our use of technology and requires a new programmatic approach to ensure secure use.

item.title: SaaS Security Series: Understanding Salesforce Administrative Permissions
item.description: In this blog, get a deep dive on the key components of major SaaS applications that play a big role in the security of those systems, including the Salesforce permissions architecture.

item.title: Midnight Blizzard and Cloudflare-Atlassian Cybersecurity Incidents
item.description: Read about Midnight Blizzard & Cloudflare-Atlassian’s cybersecurity incidents & the red flags it brought to light about the vulnerabilities of major SaaS platforms.

item.title: Learning from the State of Washington’s Data Breach
item.description: See how continuous oversight and deep visibility into SaaS configurations can prevent data breaches.

item.title: Breaking Down APRA CPS 230 Critical SaaS Operations Compliance
item.description: Learn how APRA CPS 230 mandates affect your cloud and SaaS stack, along with actionable steps to take to achieve compliance starting in July 2025.

item.title: Know Before You Go: AppOmni at RSA Conference 2024
item.description: Meet AppOmni at RSA 2024, connect with our SaaS security experts, and learn how AppOmni helps organizations prevent SaaS data breaches and achieve secure productivity.
